formulas.label: eq0019
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\text{min} Z_{L} & = & \underset{p \in P}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{p a}^{p}}{\sum} c_{a}^{p} \times n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} + \omega \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} c_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k} \\ \\ & & + \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \xi \left(a\right) \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) + \rho_{1} / 2 \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right) \left.\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1 + r_{a}\right)^{2} \\ \\ & & + \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \gamma \left(a\right) \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right) + \rho_{2} / 2 \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + s_{a}\right)^{2}\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0020
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\text{min}: Z_{x} & = & \omega \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} c_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \xi \left(a\right) \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) + \rho_{1} / 2 \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1 + r_{a}\right) ^{2} \\ \\ & & + \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \gamma \left(a\right) \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right) + \rho_{2} / 2 \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + s_{a}\right) ^{2}\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eq0021
formulas.latex: \text{min}: Z_{v} = \underset{p \in P}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{p a}^{p}}{\sum} c_{a}^{p} \times n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} + \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \gamma \left(a\right) \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k}\right) + \rho_{2} / 2 \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} + s_{a}\right) ^{2}

formulas.label: eq0022
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\text{min} Z_{x}^{k} & = & \omega \times \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} c_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} \left[\xi \left(a\right) \times x_{a^{'}}^{k} + \rho_{1} / 2 \times \left(2 \psi_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) \times x_{a^{'}}^{k}\right] \\ & & + \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \left[\gamma \left(a\right) \times \left(- q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right) + \rho_{2} / 2 \times q_{k} \times \left(q_{k} + 2 \times \mu_{a}^{k} - 2 \times \underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p}\right) \times x_{a}^{k}\right] \\ & = & \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} \left(\bar{c}\right)_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\end{aligned}

formulas.latex: \left(\bar{c}\right)_{a}^{k} = \begin{cases} c_{a}^{k} & & a \notin \left(A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \cup A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}\right) \text{and} a \notin A_{t r} \cap A_{p a} \\ c_{a}^{k} + \xi \left(a\right) + \left(\rho_{1} \times \psi_{a}^{k} - \rho_{1} / 2\right) & & a \in \left(A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \cup A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}\right) \\ c_{a}^{k} - \text{max} \left\{l o_{1} , \text{min} \left\{q_{k} \times \gamma \left(a\right) , u p_{1}\right\}\right\} + \text{max} \left\{\right. l o_{2} , \text{min} \left\{\right. \\ \rho_{2} / 2 \times q_{k} \times \left(q_{k} + 2 \times \mu_{a}^{k} - 2 \times \underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p}\right) , u p_{2} \left.\right\} \left.\right\} & & a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a} \\ c_{a}^{k} + \xi \left(a\right) + \left(\rho_{1} \times \psi_{a}^{k} - \rho_{1} / 2\right) - \\ \text{max} \left\{l o_{1} , \text{min} \left\{q_{k} \times \gamma \left(a\right) , u p_{1}\right\}\right\} + \text{max} \left\{\right. l o_{2} , \text{min} \left\{\right. \\ \rho_{2} / 2 \times q_{k} \times \left(q_{k} + 2 \times \mu_{a}^{k} - 2 \times \underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p}\right) , u p_{2} \left.\right\} \left.\right\} & & a \in \left(A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \cup A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}\right) \text{and} a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a} \end{cases}

formulas.label: eq0027
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\text{min} Z_{L R} & = & \underset{p \in P}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{p a}^{p}}{\sum} c_{a}^{p} \times n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} + \omega \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} c_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \xi \left(a\right) \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) \\ \\ & & + \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \gamma \left(a\right) \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right)\end{aligned}

formulas.latex: \text{min}: \left(\bar{Z}\right)_{x} = \omega \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{k}}{\sum} c_{a}^{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \underset{a \in A_{t r}^{d r i v e} \text{or} a \in A_{t r}^{S t r a c k}}{\sum} \xi \left(a\right) \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) - \underset{a \in A_{t r} \cap A_{p a}}{\sum} \gamma \left(a\right) \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}

formulas.label: eq0033
formulas.latex: \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a ' \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a '}^{k} - 1 + r_{a}\right)^{2} = \begin{cases} \underset{a ' \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a '}^{k} \times \left(2 \psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right) + R \psi_{a}^{k} \geq 1 \\ 0 \psi_{a}^{k} = 0 \end{cases}

formulas.label: eq0034
formulas.latex: \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1 + r_{a}\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} + \psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right) ^{2} = \left(\underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k}\right) ^{2} + 2 \times \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} \times \left(\psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right) + \left(\psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(\right. \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} + 2 \times \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} \times \left(\psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right) + \left(\psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(2 \times \psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right) \times \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} + \left(\psi_{a}^{k} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(2 \times \psi_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) \times \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} x_{a^{'}}^{k} + R

formulas.latex: \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + s_{a}\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \left(\mu_{a}^{k} + q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right)\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \mu_{a}^{k}\right)^{2} - 2 \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \mu_{a}^{k}\right) \times q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \left(q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k}\right)^{2} = \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \mu_{a}^{k}\right)^{2} - 2 \times \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p} - \mu_{a}^{k}\right) \times q_{k} \times x_{a}^{k} + \left(q_{k}\right)^{2} \times x_{a}^{k} = q_{k} \times \left(q_{k} + 2 \times \mu_{a}^{k} - 2 \times \underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times \left(\bar{v}\right)_{a}^{p}\right) \times x_{a}^{k} + W

formulas.latex: s_{a} = \begin{cases} 0 \mu_{a}^{p} \geq \sum_{k \in K} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} \\ \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} - n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \mu_{a}^{p} \mu_{a}^{p} < \sum_{k \in K} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} \end{cases}

formulas.label: eq0039
formulas.latex: \left(\underset{p \in P}{\sum} n_{p} \times v_{a}^{p} - \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} + s_{a}\right)^{2} = \begin{cases} n_{p} \times \left(n_{p} - 2 \times \underset{k \in K}{\sum} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} + 2 \times \mu_{a}^{p}\right) \times v_{a}^{p} + Q \mu_{a}^{p} \geq \sum_{k \in K} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} \\ \\ 0 \mu_{a}^{p} < \sum_{k \in K} q_{k} \times \left(\bar{x}\right)_{a}^{k} \end{cases}
